description: 12-year-old Cruz and his friends navigate the mysteries and challenges of the Explorer Academy as they compete for the coveted North Star Award.

title: The Truth Behind
description: Meet the real National Geographic explorers who helped inspire the science in the book series Explorer Academy. Watch them in action and find out how they’re changing the world through science and adventure in “Explorer Academy: The Truth Behind.”

description: In the book Explorer Academy: The Nebula Secret, 12-year-old Cruz Coronado breaks secret codes in order to fight dangerous villains and solve mysteries. Play now to test your cipher-breaking skills! Bonus: Some of the messages will give you clues about the book!

description: Cruz's Aunt Marisol sends him postcards from around the world with secret messages written in code. You can check them out too!
